items.title_en: Sony targets double-digit profit growth despite slowdown in PlayStation 5 sales amid memory price crunch
items.title_zh: 尽管 PlayStation 5 销量因内存价格紧缩而放缓，索尼仍计划实现两位数利润增长
items.desc_en: While hardware sales took a hit in Sony's fourth-quarter, strong revenue from its image sensing and music businesses offset the dip.
items.desc_zh: 尽管索尼第四季度的硬件销售受到打击，但其图像传感和音乐业务的强劲收入抵消了下滑。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors
items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Trump threatens EU with ‘much higher’ tariffs if no trade deal signed by new deadline
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁欧盟，如果在新的截止日期前未签署贸易协议，将征收“更高”的关税
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump said he will give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the U.S.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统特朗普表示，他将要求欧盟在 7 月 4 日之前批准与美国的贸易协定。

items.title_en: Nintendo hikes Switch 2 prices and expects console sales to decline as memory crunch bites
items.title_zh: 任天堂提高 Switch 2 价格并预计游戏机销量将因内存短缺而下降
items.desc_en: Nintendo said the price of the Switch 2 in the U.S. will rise  from $449.99 to $499.99. In Japan, Nintendo will hike the price from 49,980 yen to 59,980 yen.
items.desc_zh: 任天堂表示，Switch 2 在美国的售价将从 449.99 美元上涨至 499.99 美元。在日本，任天堂将价格从 49,980 日元提高到 59,980 日元。

items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，华盛顿和德黑兰之间的停火仍然有效。

items.title_en: Tech stocks could offer their best value in years, analysts say, after stellar earnings season

items.desc_en: A succession of strong earnings seasons since then has allowed tech stocks to "grow into" their stock prices.
items.desc_zh: 此后一系列强劲的财报季使得科技股的股价“增长”。

items.title_en: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby

items.desc_zh: 这位 35 岁的女士说，她正在为自己的孩子祈祷，并“非常高兴”“同时拥有五个孩子”。
